name: toggle-group
title: BTToggleGroup
description: Generic selection container that renders a row of BTToggle items. Manages single or multiple selection state internally and exposes it via controlled value + onChange. Forwards variant, size, and disabled to all children.

files.content:
export { BTToggleGroup } from './BTToggleGroup';
export type { BTToggleGroupProps, BTToggleGroupItem } from './BTToggleGroup.types';
